title: Planning and zoning
doc_html:
§523.  Planning and zoning

Except as otherwise provided herein, all developments are subject to the planning, zoning, sanitary, and building laws applicable to the locality in which the development is located.

Acts 1993, No. 772, §1; Acts 1997, No. 1188, §1.
doc_text:
§523.  Planning and zoning
Except as otherwise provided herein, all developments are subject to the planning, zoning, sanitary, and building laws applicable to the locality in which the development is located.
Acts 1993, No. 772, §1; Acts 1997, No. 1188, §1.
